recalls.Description: FUNTOK is recalling its 24V 2-Seater Ride-On Trucks, model DLS-K03, due to safety concerns. These trucks, available in red, black, white, and pink, feature '4x4' on the tailgate and 'TURBO DIESEL' on the side. The brand name and model number can be found on the User Manual cover and the packaging. The trucks may pose a serious fire and burn hazard due to overheating circuit boards, which could lead to ignition.
recalls.Title: FUNTOK 24V 2-Seater Ride-On Trucks Recalled Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach out to Shenzhen Luobei Trading Co. at 800-249-9581 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email service@funtok.net, or visit https://funtok.net/pages/voluntary-product-safety-recall for more details.

Injuries.Name: Shenzhen Luobei Trading Co. has received 11 reports of the ride-on trucks catching fire, sparking, burning, melting, overheating and smoking. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com, Walmart.com, and TikTok.com from October 2025 to December 2025 for approximately $240

Importers.Name: Shenzhen Luobei Trading Co., Ltd., of China

Hazards.Name: Overheating circuit board leading to fire and burn hazards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the truck, unplug if charging, and contact for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: FUNTOK recalls 24V Ride-On Trucks due to fire hazards. Immediate action required for safety and refunds.

recalls.Description: Huffy is recalling its Torex 24-volt ride-on toy UTVs due to a potential fire risk. These ride-on vehicles are designed in black with red accents and measure 53 inches in length, 43 inches in width, and 27 inches in height. The model names 'Torex' are displayed on both the front and sides of the toys. Model numbers 17249 and 17310, along with date codes ranging from 16919 to 11122, can be found under the body near the rear wheel. The last two digits of the date code indicate the year, while the first three represent the day of the year. For example, 16919 corresponds to June 18, 2019, and 11122 to April 21, 2022.
recalls.Title: Huffy Recalls Torex UTV Ride-On Toys Due to Fire Risk; Available Only at Walmart
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Huffy Corporation at 800-872-2453, available from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also email torex@huffy.com or visit www.huffy.com/torex-utv-ride-on-toy-recall for more details. Additional information can be found under 'Customer Service' on the Huffy website by selecting 'Recall Notices.'

Images.Caption: Recalled Huffy Torex 24V UTV ride-on toy
Model number on packaging of recalled Huffy Torex
Model number and date code located on underside of recalled Huffy Torex

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 20 reports of incidents of the UTVs smoking or catching fire, resulting in five minor burns.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively at Walmart stores and online at www.walmart.com from August 2019 through December 2024, priced between $500 and $600.

Hazards.Name: Potential fire hazard due to overheating from faulty wiring

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled UTVs immediately and contact Huffy for a free repair. Consumers may also opt for a third-party repair and will be reimbursed up to $50 for associated costs.

recalls.metaDescription: Huffy recalls Torex UTV ride-on toys due to fire hazards. Contact Huffy for repairs and reimbursement details.
